name: Kapa Hale
tagline: James Beard semifinalist in Kaimuki — hyper-seasonal Hawaiian ingredients in a cozy neighborhood room.
parking: Street parking on Waialae Ave and Kaimuki side streets (9th-12th Ave)
talkStory: Chef Kevin Lee earned James Beard semifinalist nods for Best Chef Northwest & Pacific with this intimate Kaimuki tasting-menu restaurant. The hyper-seasonal approach means the menu changes constantly based on what Hawaiian farmers and fishermen bring in that week — taro, pohole fern, local reef fish, Waianae greens. The tiny dining room feels like eating at a friend's house, and sitting near the open kitchen lets you watch the meticulous plating. Reservations essential — this is Kaimuki fine dining done with aloha, not pretension.
